message: Enable pnpm in CI before Node tests

files.patch:
@@ -88,10 +88,11 @@ jobs:
           node-version: 22
           cache: 'pnpm'
           cache-dependency-path: pnpm-lock.yaml
+      - name: Install pnpm
+        run: corepack enable pnpm
       - name: Run Node binding tests
         shell: bash
         run: |
-          corepack enable
           pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
           pnpm test
   fuzz:
